feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Execute Business Object Interface from action
entry.content:
Hi community,

A common request from customers is that a report execute a certain process and if one of the process "fail" not continue with the others process. In S/4HANA Public Cloud, the replacement for BAPI's are the Local APIs (Business Object Interfaces - BOI) for example I_MaterialDocumentTP. Only for reference, this example is obtained from the standard Knowledge Transfer Document. In theory, the REPORTED structure must return messages in case of an error occurs, but that is not the case.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_materialdocumenttp
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE FROM VALUE #( ( %cid                          = 'CID_001'
                                    goodsmovementcode             = '01'
                                    postingdate                   = '31129999'
                                    documentdate                  = '31129999'
                                    %control-goodsmovementcode                    = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-postingdate                          = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-documentdate                         = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                ) )
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE BY \_MaterialDocumentItem
             FROM VALUE #( (
                             %cid_ref = 'CID_001'
                             %target = VALUE #( ( %cid                           = 'CID_ITM_001'
                                                  plant                          = '1010'
                                                  material                       = 'RAW_MATERIAL_01'
                                                  GoodsMovementType              = '501'
                                                  storagelocation                = '101A'
                                                  QuantityInEntryUnit            = 1
                                                  entryunit                      = 'ST'
                                                  %control-plant                 = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-material              = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-GoodsMovementType     = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-storagelocation       = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-QuantityInEntryUnit   = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-entryunit             = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                              ) )

                                               
                         ) )
             MAPPED   DATA(ls_create_mapped)
             FAILED   DATA(ls_create_failed)
             REPORTED DATA(ls_create_reported).

 The "errors" only are obtained when the COMMIT ENTITIES in the REPORTED structure.

COMMIT ENTITIES
  RESPONSE OF i_materialdocumenttp
  FAILED DATA(commit_failed)
  REPORTED DATA(commit_reported).

 Of course, in the context of ABAP RAP, the use of COMMIT is not supported.

If I'm developing an application with ABAP RAP and I have an action that need to create a material document and report if an error occurs, who could I achieve that?

I know the existence of different methods of "asynchronous code execution" (app. jobs, bgPF and events), if this is the only way... what could be the best option to report/show to the user that material document is processing in background and when the process ends show the errors or the new document created?

entry.title: Adding a Value Help for a Standard field in Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi Members,

I've created a Custom business object with standard fields in it and one of the field needs a value help which is added by Association to Business Object. I tried referring to a blog 

Adding a Value Help for Custom Business Object fie... - SAP Community

But after following the steps mentioned in it, the value help is not providing any value.

Could anyone help in explaining on how to achieve this

@Cloud @ABAP

entry.title: Which user should I place in the SAP Corporate Group (CCC) S-User option
entry.content: Please indicate what type of user should be placed in the SAP Corporate Group (CCC) S-User option, the administrator user was placed, however it gives us an error

entry.title: Mass upload of delivery dates to PO's in S4/Hana Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Is it's possible to do a mass upload of delivery dates to PO's in S4/Hana Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: Alternative Reconciliation Account for Customer
entry.content:
Hello,

We need to set up the functionality Alternative Reconciliation Account in SD processes. We have been analyzing all the changes that need to be done and it seems that we'll be blocked in the point where we need to assign the account determination procedure with the billing type. Could you please let us know how to configure this functionality in SAP Cloud?

We're following this on-prem related 3rd party documentation: https://onlyordinarysapnotes.com/2013/08/26/alternative-reconciliation-account-for-customer/

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automate creating the credit segment for a new business partner.
entry.content:
• Using the job template “Update Credit Limit for Business Partners” automate the process of creating the credit segment for a new business partner by using the scheduling option.
  • Request for a selection field to provide the country(ex. PO) as a selection parameter for running the job to update the credit segment for new business partners only in the provided country.
  • Use country selection parameter to schedule template job for every country and automate the credit segment creation for business partners.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4HANA Public Cloud_Order confirmation form_change output is not triggering automatically
entry.content:
In S4HANA Public Cloud, Sales order confirmation EDI output is not triggering automatically whenever changes done to the sales order (Ex. Quantity, Dates, or other fields). 

In Output Parameter Determination app I have maintained the settings as below:- 

Output Type: ORDER CONFIRMATION CHANGE

Channel: EDI

Recipient: Sold To Number 

Could you please help me to understand what could be the issue or missing any configuration.

entry.title: Why I can't delete Project demand resource?
entry.content: I created a wrong demand resource, I closed it but still can't delete it, the delete button is gray.

entry.title: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with Whatsapp
entry.content: Is there a way of integrating SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with Whatsapp? If so, what are the recommended methods or tools to achieve this integration effectively?

entry.title: Situation Handling Safety Stock
entry.content: Do anyone know if Stock Level is a part of the standard framework in the scope item Situation Handling? I would like notifications when my stock goes below a certain safety stock threshold. It could either be directly from the safety stock in Masterdata, or just set a constraint on a number of available unrestricted stock. Any help would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: A connection check error occurred due to a App:communication Arrangements
entry.content:
I am customizing an extensibility app with reference to the article below.


After configuring communication management, an error occurs when I press the communication check in the "Communication Contract" app, and I cannot proceed with the verification.

 

error1: The ping of the outbound service has failed

error2: 403 Unified Connectivity: Forbidden

 

Please let me know the cause of the error and how to avoid it.
Kind regards.

--------------------------------------------References---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/extend-form-template-using-sap-s-4-hana-cloud-in-app-extensibility/ba-p/13377962

entry.title: display full names in order of first name and last name
entry.content:
In Japan, it is common to see the family name and first name in that order.
Can S/4HANA Public Cloud display full names in order of first name and last name?

entry.title: One Bank Account to be maintained in Multiple Company codes
entry.content:
How to add more than 1 company code to a bank account.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Confirmed POs not appearing in MRP Rescheduling Checks
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are currently in the process of implementing an S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

I have an experience an issue with exceptions reporting. Hope you could help me.

Say for a material there are PO lines with exceptions (e.g. Reschedule in, out, cancellations).

When you run the app 'Schedule MRP Rescheduling Checks', the order line exceptions appear on the list.

 

However, once you confirm the same order lines (via 'Manage Supplier Confirmation' app) without changing anything. And then running again 'Schedule MRP Rescheduling Checks'.  It will disappear from the  exceptions list.

 

Note that when you check Manage Material Coverage and MD04, it is still appearing as exceptions.

 

 

Has anyone encountered this issue before?

We still want to see confirmed orders that has exceptions but every time you confirmed an order, it gets excluded and the MRP element converts to ShpgNt.

 

Thank you,
Marc

entry.title: Equivalent fiori app for F-05 in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone knows which app used for posting with the same logic in F-05? 

When apps searched related to F-05 in fiori app library, sap gives "Clear G/L Accounts" and "Post General Journal Entries" as referance apps but we need to post also to AP, AR as we did in F-05 in GUI.

Any help?

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_Quality Management_Incoming Inspection_Operation wise quality rejection
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to record quality rejection in incoming inspection for each operation in production in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud.  we have enabled Inspection type 03 and we are able to record our results for the inspection lot but could not do usage decision for this inspection lot to record the rejected quantity operation wise as per routing. 

Is there a way to record rejection in in-process inspection (triggered through operation wise routing). 

Please advise.

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: S4HANA Cloud - Error Logs
entry.content:
Hi SDNites,

Wanted to check about error logging in S4HANA Cloud when the APIs are called from external system (Integration Suite),

1. Error log of SOAP synchronous APIs - Are those logged in Message Monitoring Dashboard. If not, where can I see them.

2. Error logs of ODATA API calls - Are those logged in Message Monitoring Dashboard. If not, where can I see them.

3. Error logs of Custom APIs - Are those logged in Message Monitoring Dashboard. If not, where can I see them.

Regards,

Abhi

entry.title: Custom value help for Custom Business Object in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to assign value help for custom business object using the standard value help of Material in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, but the value help is not fetching any data.

We are replicating the below mentioned Blog 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/adding-a-value-help-for-custom-business-object-fields/ba-p/13539317

Please let me know if anyone has successfully added a valuehelp in a Custom Business Object.

Thanks

@rosydp

entry.title: I am looking for Get & Post methods for custom Api for cloud tenant. Please guide me
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am looking for the area, where we need to maintain the code for custom validation at Get & Post methods for custom API at public cloud tenant. Please guide me to the correct way.

entry.title: API for creating Communication Management
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there an opportunity in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to create a Communication User, Communication System, or Communication Arrangement using APIs or classes?
I only found APIs for reading on https://api.sap.com/, but I need creation.

BR,
Oleg Vokh
